title: Create OnboardingQrcode component — live camera QR scanning with state border and error handling
completion_summary: Created OnboardingQrcode with ZXing BrowserQRCodeReader, OnPush+signals, green/red border, dedup guard, debug overlay, destroy cleanup
acceptance_criteria: Injects KioskSessionService, VisitorService, CameraService, Router, ChangeDetectorRef via inject()
Uses @zxing/browser BrowserQRCodeReader for frame-by-frame QR scanning
Live camera feed in square viewfinder: clamp(400px, min(50vh, 50vw), 800px), mirrored with transform: scaleX(-1), object-fit: cover
25px border on viewfinder: transparent=idle, rgba(0,255,0,0.3)=success, rgba(255,0,0,0.3)=error
Bold hint text 'Scan QR Code' below viewfinder at 3rem
On QR detected: calls visitorService.visitorCheckedInAsync(url), stores visitor in KioskSessionService, green border, waits max(API time, 2000ms), navigates to /reception/onboarding/selfie
On API error: red border, shows 'Something went wrong' below viewfinder, navigates to /reception/onboarding/home after 5000ms
Duplicate scan guard: ignores same QR value if already successfully scanned
Debug mode: ?debug=true shows overlay with raw QR value, badge ID, scan errors
Cleanup on destroy: stops camera stream, stops scanner
ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush with manual ChangeDetectorRef.detectChanges() calls as needed
Uses inject() pattern, no constructor injection
No standalone: true in decorator (Angular 21 default)
